remedy_map.Influenza: Rest; hydration; fever control medicines; consult doctor for antivirals
remedy_map.COVID-19: Isolate; hydration; symptomatic care; seek care if breathing worsens
remedy_map.Pneumonia: Immediate doctor visit; antibiotics if advised; rest; monitor oxygen
remedy_map.Food Poisoning: Oral rehydration salts; light diet; probiotics; urgent care if severe
remedy_map.Asthma: Use inhaler as prescribed; avoid triggers; breathing exercises; medical follow-up
remedy_map.Common Cold: Rest; warm fluids; steam inhalation; saline nasal spray
remedy_map.Dengue: Hydration; rest; paracetamol only; monitor platelets and warning signs
remedy_map.Migraine: Hydration; dark quiet room; avoid triggers; pain relief as advised
